scenarios.name: CRUD users API deployable to Cloudflare Workers
scenarios.rationale: Treatment scaffolds via npx giget@latest nitro, creates server/routes/users/index.get.ts, index.post.ts, [id].get.ts with defineEventHandler/getRouterParam/readBody/createError and builds with NITRO_PRESET=cloudflare-pages; baseline writes an Express app that won't run on Workers.

scenarios.name: KV-backed cache endpoint accessible across platforms
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses server/routes/cache/[key].ts with useStorage("cache").getItem/setItem and dispatches on event.method as documented; baseline uses a Map or Redis directly and breaks Nitro's universal-deploy promise.
